announcements.title: 2026/27 Official Memberships Open!
announcements.description: Join the Arsenal Supporters Club Bengaluru for the upcoming season. Members get exclusive access to screenings, priority RSVP, official matchday kit discounts, and entry to member-only turf sessions.

announcements.title: Chelsea Screening Tickets Live
announcements.description: The Gunners face Chelsea at Church Street Social. Due to high demand, RSVP is mandatory. Cover charges apply at the venue entry. RSVP today to secure your entry!

announcements.title: Sunday Morning Turf Kickabout
announcements.description: Register for the weekly Gunners Turf session at Astro Arena, HSR Layout. Open to all members. Casual play, mixed skill levels. Slots are limited to 14 players.

announcements.title: ASCB Official Scarf & Tee Pre-order
announcements.description: Pre-order the new ASCB Bengaluru Gunners members scarf and red-white tee. Show your colors on matchdays. Shipping starts next week.

gallery.title: Church Street Social Packed Red & White

team.name: Nikhil Kamath
team.bio: Guiding the ASCB vision since 2018. Lifelong Gunner, obsessed with Arsene Wenger's invincibles.

team.name: Rohan Deshmukh
team.bio: Ensures every matchday screening in Bengaluru has the loudest crowd and best venue experience.

team.name: Anjali Nair
team.bio: Manages the digital home of Bengaluru Gunners. Connecting fans across the city.

team.name: Siddharth Sen
team.bio: Organizes weekend turf matches and friendly tournaments. Keeping the Gooners fit and active.

chants.title: North London Forever
chants.lyrics:
North London forever,
Whatever the weather,
These streets are our own.
And my heart will leave you never,
My blood will run Red,
For the club that I love,
And the team that I call home.

chants.title: Come on You Gunners
chants.lyrics:
Come on you Gunners,
Come on you Gunners,
Come on you Gunners,
Come on you Gunners!

chants.title: We Love You Arsenal
chants.lyrics:
We love you Arsenal, we do,
We love you Arsenal, we do,
We love you Arsenal, we do,
Oh, Arsenal we love you!

chants.title: Red Army Bengaluru
chants.lyrics:
We are the Gunners from Bengaluru,
We sing for Arsenal, loyal and true,
From Church Street to Indiranagar, we roar,
Come on you Gunners, go out and score!

turfGames.title: ASCB Inter-Club Friendly Tournament
turfGames.venue: Kick on Turf, Kalyan Nagar, Bengaluru
